title: Delete or remove invited viewers
excerpt: How do I Delete or remove invited viewers, cant seem to find it.

posts.author: ron_w (RW)
posts.cookedHtml: How do I Delete or remove invited viewers, cant seem to find it.

posts.author: andrewalmand (Andrew Almand)
posts.cookedHtml:
@ron_w Welcome to the Monday Community!

To remove them on the board level, click the Invite button on the top right:

To remove the from your account, click your portrait icon in the bottom left and navigate to Admin>Users:

Hope this helps!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
